things.name: Nis Fortress
things.description: Impressive 18th-century Ottoman fortress on the Nisava river with four gates and towers

things.name: Skull Tower (Cele Kula)
things.description: Chilling Ottoman tower built from the skulls of Serbian rebels after the 1809 Battle of Cegar

things.name: Naissus Archaeological Site
things.description: Birthplace of Emperor Constantine the Great with Roman ruins and basilicas

things.name: Nis Concentration Camp Memorial
things.description: WWII Nazi camp where 10,000 people were executed, now a solemn memorial

things.name: Cegar Hill Memorial
things.description: Site of the Battle of Cegar with a memorial chapel on the hillside

things.name: Main Pedestrian Zone (Zona)
things.description: Lively city centre promenade with restaurants, cafes and evening atmosphere

things.name: Mediana Roman Complex
things.description: 4th-century Roman villa complex near the fortress with mosaic floors

things.name: Suva Planina Mountain
things.description: National park with dramatic Sicevo Gorge and hiking in the Balkan highlands

things.name: Sicevo Gorge
things.description: Spectacular limestone gorge carved by the Nisava river with walking trails

things.name: Nis Thermal Spa
things.description: Natural thermal springs at the Niska Banja spa resort just 10km from the city
